International

International Exchange Programs

Erasmus Programme

Incoming Students

Application Procedure

MENU

Dear
Applicant,

Thank
you for your interest in studying at Istanbul Okan University within the
Erasmus+ Exchange Programme.

In
order to be an Erasmus student at our university, there must be an
Inter-Institutional Erasmus Agreement in place between your home institution
and our university and then first you must be nominated by your home
institution. For this, your coordinator should fill in the following excel
table and send an nomination e-mail to

erasmus@okan.edu.tr

Please click to view the Excel Table.

In
case of further questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Hope
to see you at Istanbul Okan University!

The Application Deadline

For  Fall: July 15

December 15
